content.hypothesis: Fixed heterogeneous eta (per-cell, non-adaptive) affects performance
content.method: Per-cell eta[i,k] ~ U(0.0001, 0.001), fixed (not adaptive). Compare to global uniform eta
content.result: STILL +0.121, ALIVE-s2 (global) +0.168, ALIVE-hetero +0.156. Hetero LOSES on training (-0.012 vs global), WINS on novel signals (+0.042 vs global)
